dict.string: FunButton uses your microphone to transcribe what you say into text. Audio is sent only to your configured cleanup backend (Groq Whisper by default, or local Ollama if enabled).
FunButton uses Apple Events to detect the frontmost app for context-aware code mode and to paste cleaned text via Cmd+V.

FunButton needs Input Monitoring to detect when you hold the Fun Button (Fn key) for push-to-talk dictation. Granted via System Settings → Privacy & Security → Input Monitoring. Required for the default hotkey; the alternate Right Option hotkey only needs Accessibility.
